metadata.task_title: Change the theme in Power Point Slide
metadata.instruction: Open Powerpoint Slide "Task ID 41.pptx" in Documents > Task ID 41 folder, and change the presentation theme to "Gallery".
metadata.context: I want to change my presentation's theme to a colorful one.

l3.rationale: Mouse moved toward the File Explorer taskbar button.

l4.rationale: Opened File Explorer, navigated through Documents > Task 41, and opened the Task ID 41.pptx file.

l5.rationale: Covers file/backstage navigation through Documents > Task ID 41, selecting Task ID 41.pptx, and confirming open to load the presentation.
